outcomes.rollFlavourText: Anchor tenant vacates. Foot traffic collapses and the rest of the centre follows.
Occupancy slips a unit. The leasing pipeline isn't what it was.
Rental renewals hold firm. Modest appreciation, no complaints.
Wait-list for tenancy. Every square metre is spoken for at a premium.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Treat loan repayment roll as one higher on this asset.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +1 additional if current value exceeds 14.

cardDescription: Tier 1 downstream RE. Generates $2 income and 6 base loan capacity. Value rolls are symmetric around neutral; integrates up the RE chain for income and loan repayment bonuses.
flavourText: Anchor tenants are the new aristocracy.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Maintenance backlogs mount. Tenants notice, and so does the valuation.
Costs absorbed, rents unchanged. The market is neither generous nor cruel.
Strong renewal rate. Operational margins expand on the back of stable occupancy.
Rent roll outperforms. Every unit let, every contract above guide.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: −1 stress once per year when this asset's value roll is 4+. Complements Trustee's free loan restructure — operational stability = personal calm.
+1 loan cap after 2 consecutive years without a negative value roll on this asset.

cardDescription: Tier 1 midstream RE. $2 income, 6 base loan capacity, skewed upside on value rolls. Integrates for stress reduction on strong rolls and a conditional loan cap bonus after sustained positive performance.
flavourText: Someone has to collect. Might as well profit from it.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: A correction in the terrace market. Quiet, but the numbers move.
Values hold. The portfolio does what it always does — nothing dramatic.
Demand in the suburbs ticks up. Comparable sales are supportive.
Bidding wars at every auction. The terraces are suddenly the only thing buyers want.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Neutral GMI. Income from this asset is tax-exempt in any year GMI ≥ 0. Aligns with Trustee's first-$1 RE exemption — stacks for double shelter.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Income from this asset is tax-exempt in any year GMI ≥ 0. Aligns with Trustee's first-$1 RE exemption — stacks for double shelter.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap on this asset; +1 additional if current value exceeds 12.

cardDescription: Tier 1 upstream RE. Zero stress, $1 income, 6 base loan capacity. Income becomes tax-exempt in positive GMI years via midstream integration — the lightest entry point in the RE chain.
flavourText: The rent arrives whether you do or not.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: The regeneration narrative stalls. Buyers reprice for the delay.
Development on schedule, value unmoved. The market is waiting for proof.
Precinct demand builds. Early movers are already ahead.
The suburb turns. Valuations re-rate overnight and the pipeline is fully absorbed.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: +2 loan interest payments on this asset count as income offsets this year.
+1 loan cap; +1 additional if value exceeds 24.

cardDescription: Tier 2 downstream RE. $2 income, 7 base loan capacity, neutral floor on mid-rolls. Integrates midstream for income offset on loan payments and upstream for conditional loan cap expansion.
flavourText: Gentrification is just arbitrage with better marketing.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Retail below drags the residential above. Mixed use, mixed results.
Commercial and residential offset each other exactly. Flat is the outcome.
Foot traffic supports valuations on both levels. The mixed-use thesis is working.
Full occupancy across all uses. The development is oversubscribed and repriced accordingly.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Halve negative GMI delta on this asset.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +1 additional if current value exceeds 22.

cardDescription: Tier 2 midstream RE. $2 income, 6 base loan capacity, balanced roll profile. Integrates upstream for GMI resistance and downstream to increase loan capacity scaling per $10 of asset value.
flavourText: Retail on the ground floor, ambition on every other.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Logistics demand softens. Vacancy rates creep up across the estate.
Leases roll over at flat rates. Industrial land holds but doesn't move.
Supply-chain reshoring drives take-up. The sheds are full and the rents reflect it.
Structural shortage of industrial stock. Every available unit let above asking.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Value of this asset cannot fall below 10 from a single GMI event.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap for each MFG asset you own (max +3).

cardDescription: Tier 2 upstream RE. Low stress, $2 income, 6 base loan capacity. Midstream RE integration sets a value floor of 10 against GMI events; synergises with Manufacturing holdings for scaling loan capacity.
flavourText: Industrial land never goes out of fashion — it just gets rezoned.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: The luxury market corrects sharply. Discretionary buyers disappear first.
Modest appreciation on selective sales. The top end is resilient, if slow.
Premium properties transact well above reserve. International demand is back.
Record sale prices across the portfolio. Comparable evidence resets the entire suburb's ceiling.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Remove 1 loan token for free once per year (no roll needed). Complements Trustee's annual free restructure — two free removals per year.
−1 stress when this asset's value exceeds 32.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +1 additional if value exceeds 36.

cardDescription: Tier 3 downstream RE. High stress, $2 income, 7 base loan capacity with volatile high-ceiling rolls. Integrates midstream for a free annual loan token removal and upstream for stress relief at elevated valuations.
flavourText: The view from the penthouse is mostly other penthouses.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Sovereign-grade assets aren't immune. The correction is orderly but significant.
Capital preservation achieved. Marginal appreciation on institutional demand.
Trophy asset demand strengthens. Long-term holders are rewarded.
Off-market transaction at a generational premium. The trust's reputation alone drives the price.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Value cannot fall below 20 from any single event.
All income from RE assets counts as tax-exempt this year.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +2 additional if value exceeds 34.

cardDescription: Tier 3 midstream RE. $2 income, 7 base loan capacity, strong upside roll profile. Integrates upstream for a hard value floor of 20 and downstream to make all RE income tax-exempt for the year.
flavourText: Sovereignty is a title. Property is a fact.
